title: HarnessX L1 Agent Environment Contract
description: Standard environment variables passed to apply/fix runners (Tier-1 IDE agents via MCP or hx apply --runner).

HX_PHASE.description: Legacy phase command (deprecated — use HX_STAGE + HX_TASK)

HX_TASK.description: Task within HX_STAGE (e.g. propose, apply, test-case-design)

HX_TASK_TITLE.description: Human-readable task title for runner prompts

HX_TASK_PACK.description: Absolute path to task-scoped context pack markdown

HX_FIX_HINTS.description: Newline-separated self-correction hints from sensors and review annotations

HX_FIX_PACK.description: Absolute path to fix-session context pack (hx fix)

HX_FIX_SENSOR.description: Sensor id that triggered the fix session
